name: KPI Anomaly Check
description: Validate incoming KPI data against defined thresholds and produce a RAG (Red/Amber/Green) status report with anomaly explanations and recommended actions.
author: accilium
example_input: Revenue EUR 4.2M (target 5.0M, threshold -10%), churn 3.1% (threshold 2.5%), NPS 42 (threshold 40), on-time delivery 87% (threshold 95%). Check these KPIs.
